backend/main.mo: Main actor module defining content types (events, scare zones, shows, attractions, haunted houses), audition forms (scare actor, dance, costume character), user profiles, and CRUD operations with authorization mixins for managing content items, auditions, and user data.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that duplicates type definitions from main.mo and provides a run function to initialize or migrate data structures for content items, auditions, and user profiles.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting four implemented features: Bee's Dance Show in Kid Grove, Soak Kingdom water park opening 2040, 1 AM Farewell Procession, and their frontend display integration with high confidence test mappings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend components and content files describing layout components, section components, content data modules, and pages for a horror-themed attraction website with auditions, haunted houses, food booths, and shows.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for background, foreground, card, popover, primary, secondary, muted, accent, destructive, border, input, ring, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for TCEA Scream Park application with UTF-8 charset, viewport meta tag, root div, and module script loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component with QueryClientProvider, hash-based routing, background audio manager, and home page layout composing multiple sections including hero, auditions, haunted houses, food booths, merch, scare zones, shows, upcoming events, and info sections with dedicated route pages for details.
frontend/src/components/audio/Background: Manages background audio playback (chainsaw and clown laugh loops) with autoplay detection, volume control, and fallback handling. Exposes callbacks for parent components to handle autoplay blocking and manual start requests.
frontend/src/components/audio/SoundContr: Provides UI controls for toggling sound on/off and adjusting volume with a slider. Shows an "Enable sound" button when autoplay is blocked.
frontend/src/components/auth/AccessDenie: Displays a full-page access denied message for users without administrator permissions to access the content management system.
frontend/src/components/auth/EmployeeGua: Route guard component that verifies employee authentication and authorization, showing login prompts or access denied messages for non-employees.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Renders a login/logout button that handles Internet Identity authentication and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, blocking interaction until profile setup is complete.
frontend/src/components/layout/EmployeeL: Layout wrapper for employee portal pages with breadcrumb navigation, themed header/footer, and link back to guest site.
frontend/src/components/layout/Section.t: Reusable section component with centered title, optional subtitle and icon, and separator for consistent page structure.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteFoote: Site footer displaying an extreme haunt warning alert with liability waiver text and attribution with link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteHeade: Main site header component with navigation menu, authentication controls, sound controls, and employee-specific links. Handles scroll effects, mobile menu, and routing between hash-based routes and scroll-to-section navigation.
frontend/src/components/media/Fullscreen: Fullscreen video overlay component with play/pause, mute/unmute controls, and keyboard escape support. Handles autoplay with muted audio and provides a dark overlay interface for video playback.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutAt: Section describing TCEA Scream Park's building and dark history, featuring an exterior image and narrative about the facility's 2022 closure due to an evil spirit and 2026 reopening.
frontend/src/components/sections/auditio: Renders a grid of three perk cards (Food, Training, Scary Vibes) highlighting benefits for audition participants with icons and descriptions.
Provides two call-to-action cards for scare actor and dancer auditions with role descriptions, badges, and buttons that trigger respective signup flows.

Modal dialog form for costume character audition submissions with extensive fields for experience, skills, preferences, and physical details. Integrates Internet Identity authentication and backend submission hooks.
Modal dialog form for dancer audition applications requiring authentication, collecting name, age, experience, interests, and role preference. Handles form validation and submission via custom hooks.
Dialog component for scare actor audition applications with form validation, Internet Identity authentication, and submission handling using React hooks and Sonner toasts.
frontend/src/components/sections/Auditio: Auditions section displaying three audition types (Costume Character, Scream Team, Dancer) with cards, requirements, and signup dialogs. Includes navigation to detailed auditions page and perks block.
frontend/src/components/sections/ClownTo: Section showcasing an interior elevation image of the Clown Town haunted house with descriptive text about the twisted circus atmosphere and carnival horror elements.
frontend/src/components/sections/Costume: Announcement section for 2030 investment featuring new costume characters (Lola, Asher, Max, DD) and princesses with character descriptions and images.
frontend/src/components/sections/Employe: Conditional component that displays an employee portal access card with navigation button, only visible to authenticated employees based on authorization hook.
frontend/src/components/sections/FoodBoo: Displays a grid of food booth cards with images, descriptions, menu highlights, and buttons to view details or rules. Includes logic to match booth names to generated images and determine which booths have detail pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/Haunted: Renders a grid of haunted house cards with images, descriptions, wait times, and buttons to view house details or guest rules. Uses slugify utility and hardcoded navigation logic for specific house detail pages.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeHer: Hero section with autoplay video background, logo, title, description of the 2028 Fire Remix show, and call-to-action buttons for auditions (scare actor and dancer). Includes smooth scrolling and hash-based navigation.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomeInt: Video player section with custom controls for play/pause, mute/unmute, and fullscreen. Includes autoplay detection, error handling, video end detection that triggers clown laugh audio, and fallback fullscreen overlay.
frontend/src/components/sections/HomePro: Displays information about the Main Street Plaza Procession at 6pm with a featured image and descriptive text highlighting various creatures (sliders, stilt walkers, zombies) in the parade.
frontend/src/components/sections/InfoLoc: Information section showing operating hours (Fridays-Sunday, 5pm onwards), ticket pricing ($30), pass options via PassSelector component, and rules/warnings including an 11pm nightly release warning and scare actor interaction guidelines.
frontend/src/components/sections/MerchSh: Displays a filterable merch storefront with Felix's booth header image, category filters, and a grid of product cards showing merchandise items with images, descriptions, and pricing.
frontend/src/components/sections/passes/: Defines PassOption interface and exports an array of pass options with IDs, names, prices, and descriptions for various haunted attraction passes.
Pass selection UI component that displays radio-button pass options with pricing, handles selection state, and shows confirmation alerts after securing a pass.
frontend/src/components/sections/ScareZo: Renders outdoor scare zone cards with images, descriptions, and buttons to view zone details or guest rules, with special handling for Santa's Hell and Chainsaw Cold zones.
frontend/src/components/sections/Schoolh: Displays sneak peek cards for four haunted houses (Schoolhouse, Clown Town, Hell Hole, Toys Come to Play) with images, descriptions, and navigation buttons to detailed views.
frontend/src/components/sections/ShowsSe: Shows live show cards with images, descriptions, and badges indicating haunt season exclusivity, special timing, or select nights availability.
frontend/src/components/sections/Sliders: Implements a carousel for Sliders of Decade content with image/video slides, thumbnail navigation, autoplay support, and fullscreen video capabilities.
frontend/src/components/sections/Teaser2: Teases two upcoming 2027 haunted houses (Hogs Pen and Shattered Minds) with taglines and descriptive teasers in styled cards.
frontend/src/components/sections/TeaserS: Simple teaser card with animated icon announcing more content coming soon.
frontend/src/components/sections/Upcomin: Displays upcoming theme park attractions organized by year (2027-2029) with cards showing images, descriptions, types, and sub-attractions. Includes image error handling and a gallery component for multiple images per attraction.

Shows upcoming park events in a grid layout with image galleries, event details, and special handling for the Soak Kingdom water park event featuring water slides. Includes navigation to detailed event pages.
Displays future themed lands with details like size, opening year, status badges, and featured shows. Renders expansion cards from themedLands content data.
frontend/src/components/theme/HorrorBack: Renders layered horror-themed background with chainsaw imagery, animated fire/smoke/blood effects, orange/green tints, noise textures, and scanline overlays for atmospheric effect.
frontend/src/content/foodBooths.ts: Exports food booth data with horror-themed names, taglines, descriptions, and menu items for various haunted attraction food vendors.
frontend/src/content/generatedImages.ts: Centralized mapping of image paths organized by category (haunted houses, scare zones, food booths, merch shops, auditions, shows) for generated horror attraction assets.
frontend/src/content/guestRules.ts: Defines safety, behavior, and health warning rules for three haunted house attractions: Open Ice Tomb, Wax Works, and Terror Hell Hole, organized by sections with specific guidelines for each attraction.
frontend/src/content/hauntedHouses.ts: Contains an array of haunted house attractions with names, taglines, and descriptions for 11+ houses including Clown Town, Asylum Hell, Schoolhouse Break and Blackout, Terror Hell Hole, and others.
frontend/src/content/merchShops.ts: Lists three merchandise shops (Dungeon Master Shop, Painted Smiles Shop, Dead Eyes) with their items and price ranges, plus a note about additional shops throughout the park.
frontend/src/content/merchStorefront.ts: Defines a merchandise catalog with TypeScript interfaces and product data for hoodies, hats, shirts, posters, and plushies featuring characters Riley, Ace, Kevin, and Rocky.
frontend/src/content/scareZones.ts: Exports an array of five scare zones (Carnival Bros Circus, Zombie Hell, Screamtown Chaos, Grave Danger Dance, and Steampunk Hell coming 2028) with taglines, descriptions, and location data.
frontend/src/content/schoolhouseSneakPee: Provides a detailed preview of the Schoolhouse Haunted House attraction with title, subtitle, atmospheric description, and an image path for a scenic elevation view.
frontend/src/content/shows.ts: Exports an array of eight live shows including Circus Town, Dead Man's Revenge, Fire Remix, Camp Riley, Color Paint, and others, with descriptions, haunt season flags, and future year releases.
frontend/src/content/showsEntrance.ts: Defines TypeScript interface and content for a secret backstage entrance for performers, unlocking in 2040, with locked/unlocked descriptions, location details, and access instructions.
frontend/src/content/slidersOfDecade.ts: Defines the SliderItem interface and exports an array of slider content items (images and videos) for a 'Sliders of Decade' horror-themed carousel, along with title and subtitle strings.
frontend/src/content/tceaTunnels.ts: Defines the TCEATunnelsContent interface and exports detailed content about TCEA employee tunnel facilities including secret entrance, dormitories, cafeteria, TV room, and lounge areas.
frontend/src/content/themedLands.ts: Defines the ThemedLand interface and exports an array containing information about planned themed park areas, currently featuring 'Kid Grove' scheduled to open in 2050.
frontend/src/content/upcomingEvents.ts: Exports an array of upcoming event objects with details about various horror and entertainment events including Chaos Purge, Death Eaters, Frosted Haunt, Viva Nova, DMV Harbor Nights, TCEA Horror Nights, and Soak Kingdom.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, handling authentication state with Internet Identity and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionLinks.ts: Custom React hook that fetches audition links from the backend actor using React Query, returning an array of AuditionLink objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuditionSubmission: Provides three custom React hooks (useSubmitScareActorAudition, useSubmitDancerAudition, useCostumeCharacterAuditionSubmission) that handle mutation logic for submitting different types of audition forms to the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuthz.ts: Provides custom React hooks for authorization checks including fetching user roles, checking admin status, verifying employee status, and retrieving user profiles using React Query.
frontend/src/hooks/useAutoplayVideo.ts: Custom React hook that manages video autoplay functionality, handling browser autoplay restrictions and providing play/pause controls with state tracking for playback status and errors.
frontend/src/hooks/useContentItems.ts: Provides custom React hooks for CRUD operations on content items (events, scare zones, shows, attractions) using React Query, including queries for fetching and mutations for creating, updating, deleting, and seeding content.
frontend/src/hooks/useEmployeeEvents.ts: React Query hook that fetches upcoming events for the authenticated employee by calling the backend actor's getEmployeeUpcomingEvents with the current date.
React Query hook that fetches event unlock status from the backend actor for authenticated users.
frontend/src/hooks/useFullscreen.ts: Custom React hook providing cross-browser fullscreen API support with enter, exit, and toggle functions for a given element reference.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
React Query hooks for fetching and updating the main haunt schedule (EventDateRange array) with cache invalidation on successful updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useSoundPreferences.t: Custom hook managing sound preferences (enabled/volume) with localStorage persistence and default values.
frontend/src/hooks/useTunnelData.ts: React Query hooks for fetching tunnel maps, room assignments, and tunnel schedules from the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind imports, OKLCH-based horror theme color variables (orange/black/green), employee portal theme, custom utility classes for glows and effects, and forced white text styling.
frontend/src/lib/contentFormatting.ts: Utility functions for formatting backend types (dates, content types, event types, scare levels, etc.) into human-readable strings and generating type-specific field summaries.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/ActorsPage.tsx: Protected page displaying actor staffing information that requires authentication, shows login prompt for unauthenticated users, and fetches staffing counts from the backend.
frontend/src/pages/AuditionsPage.tsx: Displays a list of audition links fetched via useGetAuditionLinks hook, with loading/error states, a hiring banner for makeup artists, and a back-to-home button.
frontend/src/pages/CalendarPage.tsx: Renders a filterable event calendar that groups content items by date (expanding date ranges), supports URL hash navigation to specific dates, and displays event details in a dialog.
Detail page for the 'Candy Cane Carnage' food booth, displaying its image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back button to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ChainsawColdPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Chainsaw Cold' scare zone, showing an extreme horror warning alert, zone description, and a button to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ClownTownSneakPeekPag: Sneak peek page for the 'clown town haunted house', displaying a large hero image, title, tagline, and description with a back-to-home button.
frontend/src/pages/CmsPage.tsx: Admin CMS page with authentication/authorization checks, allowing admins to create, update, delete content items, manage the main haunt schedule, and seed initial content.
frontend/src/pages/DancerAuditionPage.ts: Form page for dancer audition submissions with authentication via Internet Identity, validation, and fields for name, age, height, weight, experience, interests, and role preference.
frontend/src/pages/EggnogExorcismPage.ts: Detail page for the 'Eggnog Exorcism' food booth displaying an image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/EmployeeUpcomingEvent: Employee-only page showing upcoming events and features with lock/unlock status, images, and navigation to detail pages for Happily Scary After, Flyn Character, and Shows Entrance.
frontend/src/pages/FlynCharacterPage.tsx: Employee-only detail page for the Flyn character showing biography, appearance schedule, costume details, and performer guidelines with unlock status based on event availability.
frontend/src/pages/FrostedHauntPage.tsx: Public detail page for the 'Frosted Haunt' seasonal event (Nov 29–Dec 26, 2026) featuring haunted houses, scare zones, and Christmas-themed horror attractions with warnings.
frontend/src/pages/GingerdeadBakesPage.t: Detail page for the 'Gingerdead Bakes' food booth displaying an image, description, tagline, and menu items with a back navigation button.
frontend/src/pages/GuestRulesPage.tsx: Displays guest rules for specific haunted houses or scare zones, parsing URL hash to determine which attraction's rules to show. Includes navigation back to the main attraction list and renders mandatory rules, safety guidelines, and prohibited items.
frontend/src/pages/HappilyScaryAfterPage: Employee-only page for the "Happily Scary After" fireworks show, displaying unlock status, show description, schedule, and viewing locations. Shows grayscale preview if not yet unlocked (premiering October 2029).
Detail page for the "Hellfire Hot Cocoa" food booth, displaying booth image, tagline, description, and full menu with item descriptions. Includes navigation back to the food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/HellHoleSneakPeekPage: Dedicated page showcasing the "Terror Hell Hole" haunted house with detailed imagery and description, including a special section for "Vicky's Saw" scenic elevation. Features full-screen images with gradient overlays and back navigation to home.
frontend/src/pages/LaserHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the "Laser Hell" scare zone with location, tagline, description, and featured image. Handles missing zone data gracefully and provides navigation back to scare zones section.
frontend/src/pages/ObsessionScreamPage.t: Dedicated page for the "Obsession Scream" haunted house featuring extreme horror warnings, character introduction (Leslie), and detailed experience description. Includes links to view guest rules and navigation back to haunted houses.
frontend/src/pages/OpenIceTombPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Open Ice Tomb' haunted house featuring an image, description, extreme horror warning alert, and navigation to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/OrnamentOssuaryPage.t: Detail page for the 'Ornament Ossuary' food booth displaying booth information, menu items with descriptions, and navigation back to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/PaintDeathBoothPage.t: Detail page for the 'Paint & Death' food booth with a split menu layout showing Paint Side and Death Side items in separate styled columns.
frontend/src/pages/SantasHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Santa's Hell' scare zone featuring zone description, extreme horror warning alert, and navigation to view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/ScareActorAuditionPag: Audition application form for scare actors requiring Internet Identity authentication, collecting personal details, experience, and role preferences with form validation and submission handling.
frontend/src/pages/SchoolhouseSneakPeekP: Preview page displaying a sneak peek of the schoolhouse attraction with a large hero image, title, subtitle, and description.
frontend/src/pages/SecretTunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page displaying confidential backstage tunnel infrastructure including maps, room assignments, and schedules with loading/error states and restricted access warnings.
frontend/src/pages/SharksHellPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Sharks Hell' food booth showing booth image, description, tagline, and menu items with navigation back to food booths section.
frontend/src/pages/ShowsEntrancePage.tsx: Employee-only page showing secret entrance details for shows and processions with unlock status checking, location details, and access instructions that appear when unlocked.
frontend/src/pages/SliderDoomPage.tsx: Detail page for the 'Slider Doom' food booth displaying booth image, description, tagline, and menu with back navigation to food booths.
frontend/src/pages/TCEATunnelsPage.tsx: Employee-only page documenting TCEA tunnel facilities including secret entrance location, dormitories, cafeteria, TV room, and other employee amenities with security notes.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlayPage.ts: Detail page for 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house featuring hero image, extreme horror warnings, attraction description highlighting 22 different scenes, and navigation to rules page.
frontend/src/pages/ToysComeToPlaySneakPe: Displays a sneak peek page for the 'Toys Come to Play' haunted house with image, title, tagline, and description, including a back button to return home.
frontend/src/pages/WaxWorksPage.tsx: Renders a detailed page for the 'Wax Works' haunted house with extreme horror warning, house description, and buttons to navigate back or view guest rules.
frontend/src/pages/WrathOfWrappingPage.t: Shows a food booth detail page for 'Wrath of Wrapping' with image, description, and menu items, including navigation back to food booths section.
frontend/src/utils/dateRange.ts: Provides utilities to expand date ranges into individual date keys, compare dates, and generate next dates for event scheduling.
frontend/src/utils/slug.ts: Exports a slugify function that converts text to URL-friendly lowercase slugs by removing special characters and replacing spaces with hyphens.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom theme extensions including horror-themed colors, animations (pulse-glow, strobe-flash, horror-drift), fonts, and employee portal color variables.
project_state.json: Project metadata tracking theme park application features including attractions, timeline, special events, and recent additions like Bee's Dance Show, Soak Kingdom water park, and 1 AM Farewell Procession.
